channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Hollywood history hits the auction block
item.description: Some of the biggest items in film history, including Luke Skywalker's lightsaber and the Wicked Witch's hat from 'The Wizard of Oz,' are up for sale t...

item.title: Iran says 14 killed in U.S. strikes ahead of Khamenei's burial
item.description: Iran's former Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei is being buried as the U.S. and Iran exchange escalating attacks.

item.title: Bonnie Tyler, singer of 'Total Eclipse of the Heart,' dies at 75
item.description: Tyler died in a hospital in Portugal, her family and team said in a statement.

item.title: Graham Platner suspends Senate campaign after sexual assault allegation
item.description: The Democratic candidate was running for the Senate in Maine.
